action_type.description: The type of UI development task to perform.

query.description: The user's request for a UI component, visualization, or bundling task.

dataset_context.description: Metadata about the scientific dataset being analyzed (e.g., GSE261849).

target_surface.description: The surfaceId to target for A2UI messages.

source_directory.description: [TODO: MANUAL REVIEW] The local directory containing webapp files to bundle, if action_type is bundle_webapp.
